design_philosophy: Industrial precision meets data clarity. The UI acts as a high-density 'Control Room' for Arıgastro's e-commerce operations. Every pixel must serve a functional purpose to track prices and manage SEO effectively. We use stark contrasts, tight grids, and structured tabular data to empower the user.

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Overlines and table headers must be uppercase, tiny, and wide spaced (tracking-widest).
Never use Inter or generic sans-serif fonts for headings.
Data and numbers should use IBM Plex Sans or Mono for tabular alignment.
Use Accent Brand (Yellow) strictly for AI actions (SEO Generation, AI Match) to highlight 'smart' features.
Use Primary (Slate 900) for standard standard actions like Save, Import.
Use Danger (Red) for rows where competitors are cheaper.
Use Success (Green) for rows where Arıgastro is cheapest.
Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 for the main dashboard.
Maintain tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) between metric cards.
Containers must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
Sidebar should be collapsible to maximize horizontal space for complex price comparison tables.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges or rounded-md. Hover state must translate-y-[-1px] and increase shadow slightly. Primary CTA is dark slate, AI CTA is yellow.
components.cards: Solid background (bg-white), 1px border (border-slate-200), subtle shadow-sm. No glassmorphism.
components.tables: Dense rows. Sticky header on desktop. Alternate row background colors (bg-slate-50 / bg-white) for readability. Align numbers to the right.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI defaults with ring-slate-900 focus state. rounded-md.
components.badges: Flat background with high contrast text (e.g., bg-red-100 text-red-700 for 'Competitor Cheaper').
components.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

images.description: Cinematic shot of a pristine industrial commercial kitchen with stainless steel equipment. To be used as the right-side cover image on the login screen.
images.usage: Split-screen login layout (50/50). The image goes on the right side, object-cover, h-full. Add a subtle bg-black/20 overlay.

icons.rules: Use for UI navigation, table actions, and status indicators. Keep stroke width to 1.5 or 2 for clarity.

animations.micro_interactions: Fast and snappy. 150ms ease-out for button hovers and dropdowns.
animations.page_transitions: Fade in with a slight upward translation (framer-motion opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 10 -> 0).

page_specific_instructions.login: Split screen layout. Left: minimal form with Arıgastro branding. Right: immersive kitchen image.
page_specific_instructions.dashboard_overview: Top row: 4 stat cards (Total Products, Unmatched, Competitor Cheaper, We are Cheaper). Below: A chart showing price matching progress and a feed of recent price alerts.
page_specific_instructions.sitemap_import: A stepper or split-pane view. Input XML URL -> Fetch -> Show tree of categories -> Select -> Import.
page_specific_instructions.price_tracking: A highly dense data table. Columns: Product Name, Our Price, Cheapest Competitor, Price Diff, Action. Highlight rows in light red background (bg-red-50) if we are more expensive.
page_specific_instructions.seo_generator: Side panel (drawer) when clicking a product. Left column: Current content. Right column: AI generated content (Title, Desc, Long Desc) with a 'Generate' button (Yellow CTA). Show SERP preview component.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using pure React + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI.
Ensure the layout is responsive, but optimize primarily for desktop/tablet as it's an admin panel.
Use mock data for Akakçe matching and sitemap parsing if the backend is not provided, but structure the UI as if it's connected.
Include 'data-testid' on ALL buttons, links, inputs, and table rows.
Apply the font families strictly. Install @fontsource/cabinet-grotesk and @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans if needed, or import from Google Fonts.
Strictly follow the color palette, especially avoiding generic blues unless specified for info states.
